overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a leather jacket walking through a rainy London-inspired city. The character navigates from a busy intersection with iconic red double-decker buses, along a modern waterfront promenade with corporate banners, and descends to a dock with moored boats.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with bus stop

events.description: red double-decker bus passes by closely on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: standing on sidewalk waiting for bus to pass before attempting to cross

notable_agents.action: red double-decker bus driving past the intersection
woman standing on sidewalk looking at phone

entered.detail: tall dark glass office building with geometric facade
black traffic light pole with horizontal signal arms
wet asphalt road with rain reflections and yellow markings
concrete pavement with tactile paving strips near curb
trees with orange and red autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a wet city sidewalk at an intersection, waiting as a red double-decker bus passes by. The scene features modern office buildings, autumn trees, and typical urban street furniture under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: character begins crossing the street from the sidewalk into the intersection
black taxi cab drives past while character is crossing the road

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection crosswalk, navigating between vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black London taxi driving through the intersection
pedestrian with umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade and curved top
white painted zebra crossing lines on wet asphalt
low grey concrete wall lining the sidewalk edge
blue corporate banner with white Tidis logo text

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide urban intersection, moving from the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk. A black taxi passes by as the character navigates toward the opposite side where modern glass towers and corporate banners become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern waterfront promenade with corporate branding and landscaping

events.description: transition from busy intersection to tree-lined waterfront promenade
approaching waterfront area with willow trees and digital advertising displays

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved promenade passing corporate banners and landscaped greenery

entered.detail: curved concrete retaining wall with planted shrubs on top
modern white building with curved geometric facade and multiple levels
large willow tree with hanging yellow branches overhanging the path
tall vertical digital advertisement screen displaying product images
calm waterway with greenish water visible between trees

segments.scene_description: Walking along a brick-paved promenade lined with blue corporate banners and modern architecture. The character passes landscaped areas with concrete planters and willow trees as the waterfront becomes visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock with moored boats and residential buildings across canal

events.description: character descends wooden ramp to lower dock level near the water
reaching water level with moored boats visible alongside the dock

agents.ego_description: walking down the wooden ramp to the floating dock and approaching the moored boats at water level

entered.detail: wooden floating dock with boats moored alongside
black metal safety railing along the water edge
multi-story brick apartment buildings across the canal
sloped wooden walkway with metal railings leading down to dock

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the waterfront and descends a wooden ramp to the floating dock level. The scene features calm canal water with moored boats, metal railings, and brick residential buildings visible across the water under the overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling urban intersection toward the quiet edge of a city waterfront. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside autumn trees as a red double-decker bus passes through the overcast city center. As the character crosses the wide asphalt intersection and passes a black taxi, the environment shifts toward a modern district dominated by glass towers and corporate banners. The scene then expands onto a brick-paved promenade lined with blue banners and willow trees before turning toward the water's edge. Finally, the camera descends a wooden ramp to a floating dock, where the urban noise gives way to calm canal water and moored boats set against a backdrop of brick residential buildings.
